data.description: 8 counterparties take $4.803 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.

data.title: Profound Medical Corp. has expanded its private placement to accommodate a long-term investor's participation.
data.description: Profound Medical Corp. (NASDAQ:PROF; TSX:PRN) has expanded its private placement, first disclosed on December 19, 2025, to enable engagement from a long-standing investor. The company, based in Toronto, revealed the adjustment on December 24, 2025.

data.title: Sidus Space closes public offering of 19,230,800 Class A shares; Nasdaq: SIDU. Innovative space & defense tech company.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in Cape Canaveral, Florida, Sidus Space, Inc. (Nasdaq: SIDU), a pioneering space and defense technology firm, disclosed the completion of its recent best-efforts public offering. The offering comprised 19,230,800 shares of its Class A stock.

data.title: Zirconium market forecast 2025-2032 for advanced ceramics, nuclear tech, coatings. Demand rising across sectors.
data.description: In Dublin, the zirconium market is experiencing significant growth and is expected to continue evolving from 2025 to 2032. This is primarily due to advancements in technology, regulatory challenges, and increasing demand across various sectors. Decision-makers in this industry need to have access to accurate insights on market trends, integration tactics, and potential growth opportunities to remain competitive. The zirconium market snapshot reveals a dynamic landscape with promising prospects for the future.

data.title: Bitwise announces monthly distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH ETFs on Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 24, 2025, Bitwise Asset Management, a prominent crypto asset manager, disclosed the monthly distributions for its range of Option Income Strategy ETFs. These include IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH. The Fund Ticker revealed the distribution per share and distribution rate for each ETF.

data.title: ImmuCell shifts focus to First Defense after FDA letter on Re-Tain. Sales force up by 50%, manufacturing expands.
data.description: In Portland, Maine on December 24, 2025, ImmuCell Corporation (Nasdaq: ICCC) disclosed receiving an Incomplete Letter from the FDA on December 23, 2025 regarding its Re-Tain ® New Animal Drug Application. Additionally, the company shared plans to augment its First Defense ® field sales team by 50% and enhance its First Defense ® manufacturing capacity. The move comes as ImmuCell focuses on developing, producing, and promoting products that enhance cattle well-being and effectiveness.

data.title: ERES to sell 88-suite property in the Netherlands for €20.6 million, with completion anticipated in March 2026.
data.description: Today, European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust, known as ERES, revealed a deal to sell an unencumbered property with 88 suites in Schiedam, the Netherlands, for roughly €20.6 million. This transaction, referred to as the Pending Disposition, is expected to be finalized by March 2026, pending the fulfillment of closing conditions. The net proceeds from this sale will be allocated for general trust purposes. However, there is no guarantee that all necessary conditions for the completion of the Pending Disposition will be met.

data.title: NFTs saw a shift in 2025 with lower prices, increased focus on utility, and cultural significance.
data.description: In the year 2025, there was a significant transformation in the non-fungible token (NFT) market. Volumes of NFTs experienced a decline, as there was a shift towards cultural realignment and an increased emphasis on practical applications in the physical world.

data.title: Japan's top-selling game converter, Brook Wingman FGC VX, launches in the U.S. Supports PS4/PS5/PC, approved for EVO.
data.description: In Nagano, Japan on December 24, 2025, the Brook Wingman FGC VX was announced as the sole approved converter for the PS4 at EVO, the biggest fighting game event worldwide. Produced by Brook, a gaming accessory company from Taiwan, this new model was unveiled in collaboration with Chapstablook. It is set to make a significant impact at the tournament, featuring exclusive support for the PS4 platform. This development marks a milestone for Brook and the gaming community participating in EVO, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and high-quality products in the industry.

data.title: Takara Standard Inc. in Osaka, Japan, launches "Space Project" to enter space industry using enamel technology.
data.description: In Osaka, Japan, on December 24, 2025, Takara Standard Inc. introduced its "Space Project." This project is part of their focus on residential equipment like system kitchens and baths. The company, located in Joto-ku, Osaka, and led by President and CEO Dai Komori, is aiming to utilize enamel technology.

data.title: Biohaven updates on Phase 2 study with BHV-7000 in Major Depressive Disorder, Dec 24, 2025. Biohaven aims to develop effective therapies.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, in New Haven, Connecticut, Biohaven Ltd. (NYSE: BHVN) announced its focus on advancing therapies for various rare and common diseases. As a global clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, Biohaven is dedicated to developing innovative treatments to improve the lives of individuals worldwide.

data.title: Hampton to exchange shares for debt in company decision.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that a total of 500 new jobs will be created in the tech industry through a government initiative. This initiative aims to support startups and small businesses by providing funding and resources for expansion. The jobs will be spread across various sectors within the tech industry, with an emphasis on software development and data analytics. Additionally, the initiative will inject $1 million into the local economy through tax incentives and grants. This effort is part of a broader strategy to boost the region's technology sector and stimulate economic growth.

data.title: Offchain Labs raises ARB stake as Arbitrum hits $20B mark, underscoring their commitment amidst price drop and rising layer-2 rivalry.
data.description: Offchain Labs showcases strong confidence in Arbitrum by boosting its ARB holdings amidst a decline in governance token prices and heightened competition within layer-2 solutions.

data.title: MiniTool Software Limited launches new MiniTool Screen Recorder allowing screen and webcam recording with annotations.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC - On December 24, 2025, MiniTool Software Limited introduced MiniTool Screen Recorder, a cutting-edge screen recording software. The program enables users to capture their screen and webcam footage while offering the ability to include annotations. Some notable features of MiniTool Screen Recorder 1.0 include...

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC advises Equinix, Inc. shareholders to act quickly on potential breaches by officers/directors.
data.description: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC in New York is currently investigating potential breaches by certain officers and directors of Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ: EQIX). Shareholders are advised to contact the firm promptly as time to enforce their rights may be limited. The investigation concerns actions of the company's leadership.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges Edwards Lifesciences Corporation shareholders to discuss their rights, act promptly.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly reach out to the company regarding potential rights enforcement opportunities as time constraints may apply. A legal entity specializing in investor rights, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, reported on December 24, 2025, is looking into potential misconduct by specific officers and directors at Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE:...).
